headline: Boeing’s backlog boom puts cash flow to the test
summary: Boeing’s (BA) recovery story is starting to change. For most of the past year, the stock traded on backlog and the idea that production would eventually normalize. Now, the focus is shifting. Investors are no longer asking whether demand exists. The order book is already there. The stock is down ...
